nexus_v4_safe_3leg.description: NEXUS v4 RELAXED 3-Leg (no evaluator gate, no devils)

_shadow_parlays.strategy_description: Greedy by nexus_score (baseline)
Sort by weighted L5/L10 HR
Worst L10 game still clears line
1 best per game, max diversity
No two legs same stat type
At least 50% UNDER legs
Only spread < 8 games
HOT+OVER or COLD+UNDER only
Prefer home players
Favorable matchup keywords
Sort by XGBoost ML probability (trained on graded data)
Require at least 1 BLK/STL leg (85%+ historic accuracy)
Zero combo stats — pts/reb/ast/3pm/stl/blk only
Only picks where L10 HR = 100%
Sort by floor clearance (worst case still clears)
Only games with spread <= 4 (starters play full minutes)
Sort by season avg margin over line
All 3 legs UNDER
Sort by mins_30plus_pct desc (most stable minutes)
Filter out cooling trends (L10 HR > L5 HR + 20)
Sort by absolute gap only (biggest projection edge)
Shadow: Sort by XGBoost ML probability
